name: Command Injection Against Public Application
description: Detects OS command injection patterns in web request parameters
query:
// Detect OS command injection in web requests
// Trigger on shell metacharacters and command patterns in URLs
events from proxy
where url matches "(?i)(;|\||\x60|\$\()\s*(cat|ls|id|whoami|wget|curl|nc|bash|sh|ping|sleep)"
group by source_ip
having count(*) > 2
within 60 seconds
